/etc/systemd/system/backup.timer.content:
[Unit]
Description=Daily database backup

[Timer]
OnCalendar=daily
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

/etc/systemd/system/backup.service.content:
[Unit]
Description=Run database backup script

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/opt/scripts/backup.sh
User=backup

/etc/systemd/system/cleanup.timer.content:
[Unit]
Description=Post-boot temp cleanup

[Timer]
OnBootSec=5min
OnUnitActiveSec=6h

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
